# vendor/

Local copies of approved external libraries. No build step required — files are loaded directly via `<script>` tags in `index.html`.

## Contents

| File | Library | Version | Source |
|------|---------|---------|--------|
| `phaser.min.js` | Phaser 3 | v3.90.0 | https://github.com/phaserjs/phaser/releases/tag/v3.90.0 |

## Policy

New libraries may only be added if they satisfy the three-criteria vetting process defined in the project charter: necessity, documentation quality, and net complexity reduction. All other external library inclusions are prohibited.
